item.description: Same for my hysterectomy gals out there. Fuck Cancer babes rock! Stephanie Germino; her story -- https://independent.co.uk/life-style/double-mastectomy-tiktok-reconstruction-b2291543.html -- https://tiktok.com/@theebooblessbabe Singer (our right) is Jax, the singer of Victoria’s Secret, a body positivity song which hit #2 on Billboard Adult Top 40 list in late 2022. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jax_(singer) Thanks @RummageSaleBubbler ♡

item.title: Have a great weekend!

Source: Father Ted
https://www.cbsnews.com/news/female-stingray-pregnant-no-males-is-shark-the-father/
And memes and random quotes left in messager apps at 3am.
Source: Nathan Pyle
Sign me up!
This old, I'm this old. Loved Gilbert Gottfried in these as a kid.
Don't threaten me with a good time.
Chaotic good targeted advertising.
This one got me. I blew air quite loudly from my nose at 2am.
Arrested Development Narrator Voice: "But they DID see things, so many things."

item.title: Images of Note: plunk
item.description:
I would say he was fuckin' something but I'm not sure about the shoes.
This is not even the gayest thing you will see today
RIP AND TEAR!
It takes six months to train as a Cop in Florida
DUCK HELL! (Woohoo!)
that's just my typical day
Am Scottish, can confirm.
We can't all be Neurotypical Tiffany!
Imagine being an Air Crash investigator and the last thing you hear on the CVR is the captain playing the sax.
:
O-O
I want to inform you that the tumblr post I got this from had everyone calling the Possum a whore.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay

item.title: Dog has the fastest wiggle butt andis the best dancer
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: I had the best mother and the best friend I'll ever have...
item.description: Multi-systemic organ failure as a result of CO2 poisoning, influenza A, pneumonia, and a staph infection of the blood. Pre-existing comorbidities were COPD and depressed kidney function. She was sick for a week and during that time her COPD prevented her from taking up enough oxygen and expelling enough carbon dioxide. It built up in her body until she collapsed on her couch. By the time my Dad found her in the early morning hours it was already too late. The damage was done and her body wasn't strong enough to repair itself. She was rushed to the ER and spent over a week in the ICU on ventilation, dialysis, and antibiotics. It was well known she had zero interest in living if it meant being hooked up to a machine unable to care for herself for the rest of her life. She passed peacefully under heavy medication not feeling any pain or stress. It's fucked up. It really is... At least she got to live long enough to see her son quit drinking for good...even if I couldn't repair the damage I did to my life to become successful before she passed, she still got to see her son defeat a 13 year long demon...
item.dc:creator: JustSomeDoodWhoWantsToUseThisWebsiteToInteractWithFellowPeople

item.title: The rental boom has been showing its cracks for ages. Most landlords either live like this or like literal kings with no middle ground
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: Just wanted to point on there is only $70 dollars in bills on the table
item.description: 2 $20 1 $10 1 $5 15 $1 40+10+5+15=70 And I am only seeing two baggies of marijuana. Did they raid a middle schooler? What's in the prescription bottle - Ritalin? Looks like someone ratted out their older brother. Tax dollars well spent.

item.title: For Gondor! A Messenger bag I recently made
item.description: It is the small things, every day deeds of ordinary folk, that keep the darkness at bay. -Gandalf The White tree of Gondor messenger bag I love the black version of this bag . . . . . . #leather #bag #messengerbag #laptopbag #workbag #gondor #middleearth #handmade #leathersmith #maker #vancouverisland #artist #sooke #sookebc #metis #metisartist #lotr #lotrart #jrr #tolkien #lordoftherings #lotrfan #middleearthfan Feel free to peruse my wares www.skinznhydez.com
